Muse.uploadPhotosDesc: Upload 3 different photos (front and sides) for best results.
Muse.fixSuccessDesc: Congratulations! You will now produce using this avatar.
Muse.onboardingSubtitle: First step: Create Your Uniq Character
Muse.onboardingDesc: To generate content, you must first fix an Uniq Avatar. This avatar will be your digital twin or your brand face, ensuring consistency across all generations.
Muse.createWithPhotoDesc: Upload your own photo and let Uniq create your digital twin.
Muse.aiCreateDesc: Describe your dream character and let Uniq create it from scratch.
Muse.characterFixed: Character Fixed - Ready for Consistent Production
Muse.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your character? This action cannot be undone.
Muse.mainRef: This character is the main reference for all generations.
Muse.actionDesc: Your character's physical traits (hair, eyes, face) will be automatically protected.
Muse.noProdYet: No production yet. Press the button above to start!
Muse.uniqIntegrationDesc: This avatar will now appear as your identity on the Uniq Assistant page, and protected traits will be maintained in automated drafts.
Muse.actionPromptPlaceholder: e.g., Walking in the woods at sunset, wearing athletic gear...
Muse.descriptionPlaceholder: Hair color, eye color, general style...
Muse.title: Shot Type
Muse.directorModeDesc: Control composition, angle, mood, and lighting for the perfect shot.
Muse.unlockProDesc: Enable erotic and exotic creative controls.
Muse.digitalTwinRequiredDesc: Uniq Muse requires an active Digital Twin. Unlock yours on the Uniq page to start generating identity-consistent content.
Muse.trainingDatasetDesc: Upload close-ups, medium shots, and different lighting conditions to ensure perfect neural capture. Avoid group photos.
Muse.neuralLearningActiveDesc: Your Digital Twin is currently being processed by the neural engine. This process takes approximately 30 minutes. You can safely close this page.
Muse.imaginaryStartedDesc: Your imaginary character is being generated and trained.
Muse.failedStartNeural: Failed to start neural learning sequence.
Muse.provideDescription: Please provide a detailed imagination description.
Muse.upload15: You must upload exactly 15 photos for optimal results.

AIStudio.title: AI Studio
AIStudio.subtitle: Produce consistent and high-quality character images.
AIStudio.uniqAsistanDesc: Enrich and manage your content with Uniq Premium.
AIStudio.activateDesc: Activate your Uniq Premium to enable autonomous drafting, daily intelligence, and exclusive content strategy.
AIStudio.goContainerDesc: Last drop ready, go to container and make it ready for publish.
AIStudio.protocolDesc: Once activated, Uniq Premium remains strictly ON for 30 consecutive days. Daily drafting fees (2 ULC) will be auto-deducted from your available balance. If balance is insufficient, drafts will pause but subscription remains valid until expiry.
AIStudio.icerikYukleDesc: Include your own custom content into the system and prepare for publishing.
AIStudio.aiMuseDesc: Create your own character and tell consistent stories.
AIStudio.freeArtDesc: Create anything you imagine: landscapes, architecture, nature and more.
AIStudio.whyStudioDesc: The Unverse AI engine is designed to take your creativity to the next level. Here, you don't just produce content, you build a digital empire.
AIStudio.animateLoadingLong: Video is being generated. This process may take 3-4 minutes, please do not leave the page...
AIStudio.outfitLockPlaceholder: Describe the outfit (e.g. Red Dress, Space Suit)...
AIStudio.outfitLockTooltip: Manually lock the clothing style to keep it consistent across different scenes.
AIStudio.savedInPoolDesc: Your image has been saved to the production pool (draft state).
AIStudio.featureFrozenDesc: This feature is currently under development and will be activated very soon.
AIStudio.digitalTwinDesc: Upload a photo to create your unique digital twin character.
AIStudio.aiEditDesc: Selective editing: Modify backgrounds or objects without changing the person.
AIStudio.selectAction: What's the next step for this masterpiece?
AIStudio.setupMainCharacterDesc: Define the physical traits for your virtual persona.
AIStudio.mainCharacterLockedDesc: Your digital twin is locked. You can now generate new scenes at a discounted price (5 ULC) without uploading a photo.

AIStudio.promptPlaceholderDigitalTwin: Where do you want to see your digital twin? (e.g. drinking coffee in Paris, working out). Min 3 words.
AIStudio.promptPlaceholderAiEdit: Describe the changes you want (e.g. change background to beach, add a coffee in hand). Min 3 words.
AIStudio.needsMoreDetail: Needs more detail (min 3 words or 20 chars)

Staking.title: Unstake Protocol
Staking.subtitle: Earn a portion of all platform fees with zero lock-up liquid staking.
Staking.connectToEarn: Connect your wallet to earn platform yield.
Staking.welcomeBonusDesc: You've earned 15 ULC to start creating or unlocking content right away!
Staking.lockDesc: Lock ULC to receive staking rewards.
Staking.unstakeDesc: Withdraw your staked ULC back to available balance.
Staking.instantNotice: Unstake is instant on Unverse. There are no hard lock periods; you can withdraw your ULC at any time and rewards for the withdrawn amount stop immediately.
Staking.rewardInfo: Staking rewards are derived from the 5% platform commission on every USDC monthly subscription. Incentives are calculated on the 27th of each month, based on the average staked balance over the preceding 30 days.

Tokenomics.subtitle: Powered by $ULC Utility Token
Tokenomics.presaleDesc: Secure $ULC before DEX listing at 33% discount.
Tokenomics.baseNoticeDesc: $ULC will be natively launched on the **Base** network after the presale. Your connected EVM wallet (Wagmi) will be used for all claims and future utility, ensuring a seamless premium experience.
Tokenomics.round1Desc: 20 Million ULC @ $0.009. Rewarding early believers and core creators.
Tokenomics.round2Desc: 40 Million ULC @ $0.012. Scaling the community and attracting mid-tier investors.
Tokenomics.round3Desc: 40 Million ULC @ $0.014. Final round before $0.015 DEX listing. Focus on FOMO.
Tokenomics.investorDesc: Explore deflationary mechanics, revenue-backed yield, and long-term scarcity models.

Community.heroDesc: Welcome to the heartbeat of Unity. Join our global networks, explore our strategic vision, and shape the future of creator economy.
Community.forumDesc: Join the discussion. Wallet connection required for posting.

Community.investorDesc: Deep dive into the 1B fixed supply, M-Floor protocol, and AI-driven deflationary engine.
Community.creatorDesc: Learn how the first 100 creators earn dynamic bonuses and unlock high-yield monetization.
Community.roadmapDescLong: Explore our 4-phase journey to the Base Mainnet launch and ecosystem maturity.
Community.noTopics: No topics yet. Be the first to start a discussion!

SupportChat.initialAiMessage: Hello! I am your Unverse AI Premium Support. You can ask me anything about the platform, subscriptions, or Uniq Premium features.
SupportChat.systemPrompt: You are the official support partner for the Unverse AI platform. Unverse AI is a Web3 platform where creators produce content using AI, share it, and earn with ULC tokens. Your primary language must be {locale} (but answer in the user's language if they write in another). Use a polite, helpful, and tech-focused tone. Key Info: Uniq Premium is 10 ULC/month, ULC is the core currency, Unstake Protocol provides passive income, Pre-sale is ongoing, Container limit is 60 media.
SupportChat.errorMsg: Sorry, I cannot connect right now. Please try again later.

Post.exclusiveDesc: This is a limited edition drop. Unlock to own a digital copy with a unique serial number.
Post.individualPriceDesc: Unlock this premium content to view the full masterpiece.

Uniq.desc1: Upload your photos or describe a dream character — Uniq trains a LoRA model that captures your exact identity and recreates you across infinite scenes with pixel-perfect consistency.
Uniq.poweredBy: ↑ Powered by your Digital Twin — every image is consistently you
Uniq.featuresDesc: Strategic intelligence and calendar tools are free. Digital Twin creation requires a one-time unlock.
Uniq.feat1Desc: AI-powered daily content strategy and optimization insights tailored to your niche.
Uniq.feat2Desc: Smart scheduling that places your media at peak engagement times automatically.
Uniq.feat3Desc: Your identity, recreated with pixel-perfect fidelity across infinite scenes and styles.
Uniq.feat4Desc: Full cinematic control: composition, angle, mood, lighting, outfit. Every frame, your way.
Uniq.step1Desc: One-time ULC payment activates your Digital Twin engine.
Uniq.step2Desc: Upload 15+ photos or describe your ideal character. Our neural engine evaluates quality.
Uniq.step3Desc: fal.ai LoRA model trains (~30min) to capture your exact facial features and style.
Uniq.step4Desc: Your Digital Twin is ready. Generate yourself in any scene with perfect consistency.
Uniq.pathDesc: No monthly fees. One single unlock gives you permanent access to your Digital Twin engine.
Uniq.photosPathDesc: Upload 15+ real photos of yourself. Uniq's neural engine selects the best ones, evaluates quality, and trains a LoRA model that captures your exact facial features and style.
Uniq.imaginaryPathDesc: Describe a character that exists only in your imagination. Uniq generates 15 high-quality reference images across different angles and conditions, then trains a LoRA model from them.
Uniq.finePrint: ULC retail price: $0.015 / ULC. Photos unlock ≈ $7.50 · Imaginary unlock ≈ $10.50. Once unlocked, your Digital Twin engine stays active permanently with no recurring fees. Each AI generation session is billed separately at standard rates.
Uniq.trainingWaitPhotos: Waiting for your photo uploads to begin training
Uniq.trainingWaitImaginary: Waiting for your character description to generate references
Uniq.loraModelTraining: LoRA model training on fal.ai infrastructure...
Uniq.nStepP1: Go to Uniq Muse and upload 15+ clear, high-quality photos
Uniq.nStepP2: Our neural engine will evaluate and select the best 15
Uniq.nStepP3: Click 'Start Neural Learning' to begin LoRA training (~30 min)
Uniq.nStepP4: Return here — your twin will be ready to generate scenes!
Uniq.nStepI1: Go to Uniq Muse and describe your dream character in detail
Uniq.nStepI2: Uniq generates 15 reference images across different angles
Uniq.nStepI3: LoRA model trains on your character references (~30 min)
Uniq.nStepI4: Your imaginary character twin becomes your permanent identity
Uniq.connectWalletToast: Please connect your wallet to unlock Uniq.
Uniq.resetConfirm: Are you sure you want to reset your Digital Twin? This will permanently delete your current identity and REQUIRE A NEW ULC PAYMENT to start over.
Uniq.onboardingSubtitle: Neural training reset. You can now choose a new path.
Uniq.auditTipCloseups: We need more close-up portraits (face focus) from different angles.
Uniq.auditTipFullBody: We need more full-body shots to learn your posture correctly.
Uniq.auditTipVariety: Add photos in different lighting or outfits for better results.
Uniq.auditTipEmpty: Go to /creator gallery and upload 15+ high-quality photos of yourself.
Uniq.goToGalleryToUpload: Go to Gallery to Add Photos

Game.heroSubtitle: Discover treasures hidden in parallel universes. Solve puzzles. Win real rewards.
Game.noChests: No chests in this universe yet.
Game.sealBrokenDesc: The seal has been broken. The knowledge within is now accessible to the network and your bounty has been secured.
Game.incorrectAnswerDesc: The frequency does not match the seal. Observe the clue chain and try again.
Game.ctaSubtitle: Connect your wallet to open chests and earn rewards. Entry is completely free.
Game.leaderNoActivity: No activity recorded yet in this universe.
Game.leaderUpdateInfo: Rankings updated in real-time on network confirmations
Game.invVaultDesc: Connect your sovereign wallet to access your encrypted asset vault.
Game.invEmptyDesc: You haven't found any artifacts yet. Begin your hunt in one of the parallel universes.
Game.allianceHubSub: Join forces with other hunters. Share clues, tackle huge puzzles together, and split the rewards in our decentralized mining pools.
Game.allianceHubClearanceDenied: Clearance Denied: You must solve at least (1) chest to prove your leadership capabilities.
Game.allianceHubCoord: By founding an alliance, you become the primary coordinator. You can invite up to 15 other hunters to your team.
Game.allianceHubNoDetected: No other alliances detected on the network.
Game.allianceClearanceDesc: You must solve at least one treasure chest before founding an alliance.
Game.securityBruteWarn: Brute-force protection active: 1 ULC has been burned for this incorrect submission.
